title: Annual Reports - FEDERAL RESERVE BANK of NEW YORK

source.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

summary: This is a navigation/listing page for Federal Reserve Bank of New York annual reports, not a substantive research document. The page contains only a dropdown menu for selecting annual reports from 2025 to 1997 and a note that financial statements began being released starting fiscal year 2018. No specific market structure data, macro catalyst analysis, or archival content is present on this page.
key_points: This is a container/listing page for accessing annual reports, not a research document
The page provides year selection from 2025 to 1997 via dropdown menu
Financial statements are noted as starting fiscal year 2018, replacing annual reports
No substantive market structure or macro catalyst content is present

issues_found: Source is a listing/navigation page containing only a dropdown menu for selecting annual reports - not a research document
No substantive market structure or macro catalyst content present
No URL provided in source metadata, making source non-recoverable
Archive value is zero - page is merely an interface for accessing PDF financial statements
Per Rule 8, listing pages must not be accepted
Per Rule 9, container pages should bias toward reject

notes: NON-ARCHIVABLE: This source is a navigation/listing page (dropdown menu for annual report selection) and contains no substantive research content related to market structure or macro catalysts. It should not be archived as a standalone research record. Per rule 9, listing pages should be treated as non-archiveable. The page structure indicates it is a container for selecting reports rather than a research document itself.
